startSync: Synchronizing folder and nested documents, ${docs} total...
confirmSync: Detected ${docs} documents in the current folder path. Are you sure you want to start synchronization?
noDocs: No documents found in the current path.
openDocFirst: Error: Please open a document first.
docNotFound: Document info not found in database.
cannotSyncRoot: Safety Note: Root directory (entire notebook) cannot be synchronized. Please navigate to a sub-folder.
